name: ye4wzp--frontier-knowledge-digest
description: Daily digest of cutting-edge science, AI, and top journal papers worldwide. Searches 12+ domains including Nature, Science, arXiv, AI news, biomedicine, physics, quantum computing, neuroscience, robotics, and more. Generates structured, rated reports with star ratings and source links. Triggers: "前沿知识简报", "科技新闻", "最新论文", "daily digest", "frontier knowledge", "science news", "AI news today".
